examples.title: Heapify Algorithm
examples.code:
PROCEDURE heapify(arr, n, i)
    largest = i
    left = 2*i + 1
    right = 2*i + 2

    IF left < n AND arr[left] > arr[largest]
        largest = left
    IF right < n AND arr[right] > arr[largest]
        largest = right
    IF largest != i
        SWAP arr[i], arr[largest]
        heapify(arr, n, largest)
examples.explanation: Recursively ensures parent node is largest
